arts.ttl: “Proving people wrong” – Chelsea praised for smart transfer business as Man Utd miss out
arts.sum: Chelsea have been praised for bringing in Jadon Sancho in a bargain transfer move from Manchester United, with Ian Wright hugely impressed by the player’s improvement this season. Sancho joined Chelsea from Man Utd in the summer, in what is technically an initial loan move, but which has the obligation to become permanent for £25m.
